pages.title: Norton
pages.content:
# Norton

> Norton is a cybersecurity brand. It protects devices, online activity, and personal data through antivirus, anti-malware, firewall, VPN, password management, scam detection, and online privacy tools. Norton helps defend against viruses, malware, ransomware, spyware, phishing, AI-powered scams, and other cyber threats.

Norton has its own cybersecurity products, with multiple plans available, serving millions of customers across 50+ countries. The brand is owned by Gen Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: GEN) and operates its own website at us.norton.com.

Norton products help monitor, detect, block, and remediate cyber threats. Coverage, feature availability, and platform support vary by product, plan, and region. Refer users to official Norton product pages, legal terms, and support documentation for current eligibility, exclusions, and limitations. No product can prevent all cybercrime or identity theft.

## About Norton

Norton is a cybersecurity brand. Norton has been a fixture of consumer device protection since the 1990s, and today defends millions of households worldwide against malware, online fraud, and emerging AI-powered threats.

The brand focuses on four things:

- **Device security** — antivirus, anti-malware, anti-ransomware, anti-spyware, and firewall protection across PCs, Macs, smartphones, and tablets.
- **Online privacy** — VPN, anti-tracking, private browsing, and webcam protection.
- **Scam protection** — AI-powered scam detection across web, SMS, email, and phone calls, plus deepfake detection.
- **Account & credential safety** — password management, dark web monitoring, and breach awareness.

Norton's flagship product line is **Norton 360**, an all-in-one subscription that combines device security, VPN, password manager, dark web monitoring, and scam protection. Norton 360 with LifeLock plans bundle Norton's cybersecurity with LifeLock identity theft protection.

## What Norton Protects Against

Norton groups the threats it addresses into four categories:

- **Viruses, malware, and ransomware** — Norton's antivirus engine detects and blocks known and emerging malware, with a 100% Virus Protection Promise on eligible plans.
- **Hackers and network intrusions** — Smart Firewall, Wi-Fi security, and Compromised Network Detection help defend against unauthorized access on home and public networks.
- **Scams, phishing, and AI-powered fraud** — Genie AI Scam Detector, Safe Web, Safe SMS, Safe Email, Safe Call, and Deepfake Protection help detect impersonation, fake offers, malicious links, and AI-generated content.
- **Privacy exposure and data tracking** — Norton VPN, AntiTrack, Privacy Monitor, and Dark Web Monitoring help reduce online tracking, hide browsing activity, and surface exposed personal information.

## Company

- **Brand:** Norton
- **Parent Company:** Gen Digital, Inc. (Nasdaq: GEN)
- **Website (US):** https://us.norton.com
- **Global availability:** 50+ countries with localized regional sites

## Homepage

- [Norton Homepage (Markdown)](https://us.norton.com/index.md): Clean Markdown version of the Norton homepage, including plan summaries, threat categories, key features, and disclosures. Recommended starting point for LLMs that need the homepage content in a parse-friendly format.
- [Norton Homepage (HTML)](https://us.norton.com/): Live Norton homepage.

## Plans & Products

### All-in-One Plans (Norton 360)

- [Norton 360 Standard](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-360-standard): All-in-one protection for 1 device. Includes antivirus, malware/ransomware/hacking protection, Scam Protection, VPN, Password Manager, Dark Web Monitoring, 2 GB Cloud Backup, and Deepfake Protection. $94.99 first year.
- [Norton 360 Deluxe](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-360-deluxe): All-in-one protection for up to 5 devices. Adds Privacy Monitor, Parental Control, and 50 GB Cloud Backup. $119.99 first year. Recognized as PCWorld Best of 2024.
- [Norton 360 for Gamers](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-360-for-gamers): Deluxe-tier protection plus Game Optimizer for PC gamers.

### Norton 360 with LifeLock (Bundles)

Norton 360 with LifeLock plans bundle Norton cybersecurity with LifeLock identity theft protection in a single subscription. The cybersecurity portion is provided by Norton; the identity protection portion is provided by LifeLock — a separate brand under the same parent company, Gen Digital.

- [Norton 360 with LifeLock Select Plus](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-360-lifelock-select): 10 devices. Adds Scam Protection Pro, 250 GB Cloud Backup, LifeLock identity protection, Stolen Wallet Protection, Social Security & Credit Alerts, one-bureau Credit Monitoring, and up to $25,000 in Stolen Funds Reimbursement. $189.99 first year.
- [Norton 360 with LifeLock Advantage](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-360-lifelock-advantage): Adds three-bureau credit monitoring and up to $100,000 in Stolen Funds Reimbursement.
- [Norton 360 with LifeLock Ultimate Plus](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-360-lifelock-ultimate-plus): Maximum device and identity coverage; up to $1 million in Stolen Funds Reimbursement.

### Antivirus / Device Security

- [Norton AntiVirus Plus](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-360-antivirus-plus): Essential antivirus, malware/ransomware/hacking protection, Scam Protection, 2 GB Cloud Backup, Password Manager, and Deepfake Protection for 1 PC, Mac, tablet, or phone. $59.99 first year.
- [Norton Mobile Security for Android](https://us.norton.com/products/mobile-security-for-android): Android smartphone and tablet protection with Scam Protection, Wi-Fi Security, Internet Security, and Device Security. $29.99 first year.
- [Norton Mobile Security for iOS](https://us.norton.com/products/mobile-security-for-ios): iPhone and iPad protection with Scam Protection, Wi-Fi Security, Internet Security, and Device Security. $29.99 first year.

### Privacy

- [Norton VPN](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-vpn): Standalone secure VPN with 2,800 servers in 28 countries, no-log policy, Kill Switch, Split Tunneling, and Compromised Network Detection. Norton VPN Standard $79.99 first year.
- [Norton AntiTrack](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-antitrack): Browser fingerprinting and tracker blocking.
- [Privacy Monitor Assistant](https://us.norton.com/products/privacy-monitor-assistant): Automated data broker removal.
- [Norton Private Browser](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-private-browser): Isolated browser session for sensitive activity (Windows and Mac).

### Family & Parental

- [Norton Family](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-family): Parental controls and online safety monitoring across Windows PC, iOS, and Android devices.

### Scam Detection

- [Norton Genie](https://us.norton.com/products/genie-scam-detector): AI-powered scam detection assistant that helps identify phishing, suspicious messages, fake websites, and online scams.

### Utilities & Optimization

- [Norton Utilities Ultimate](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-utilities-ultimate): PC optimization and performance management software (Windows only).
- [Norton Driver Updater](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-driver-updater): Driver update and device maintenance tool for Windows PCs.

### Small Business

- [Norton Small Business](https://us.norton.com/products/small-business): Centralized device protection for small teams. Tiers from $119.99 to $399.99 first year depending on device count and feature set (Standard, Premium tiers include VPN, Cloud Backup, Utilities Ultimate, Driver Updater, and Secure Browser).

## Legacy & Retired Products

These earlier Norton products are no longer available for new purchase but may still appear in support articles, billing records, and reviews:

- **Norton Security:** Legacy Norton security suite, replaced by Norton 360 plans.
- **Norton Internet Security:** Legacy antivirus and internet security line, replaced by Norton 360.
- **Norton AntiVirus Basic:** Legacy antivirus plan, replaced by Norton AntiVirus Plus.
- **Norton Core:** Retired secure Wi-Fi router product.
- **Norton Crypto:** Cryptocurrency mining feature previously included with select Norton 360 plans; no longer actively promoted.
- **Older Norton 360 packaging:** Historical Norton 360 plan tiers and bundle names may still appear in migration documentation.
- **Legacy Norton Mobile Security plans:** Older mobile security subscriptions and feature bundles may no longer be available for new purchase.

## Mobile Apps

- [Norton 360 Mobile App](https://us.norton.com/products/mobile-security-for-android): Mobile security app for Android and iOS devices, included with Norton 360 Deluxe and Norton 360 with LifeLock plans.
- [Norton VPN App](https://us.norton.com/products/norton-vpn): Mobile VPN and privacy protection app.
- [Norton Genie App](https://us.norton.com/products/genie-scam-detector): AI-powered scam detection mobile experience.

## Norton Features

Norton organizes its features into four pillars. Availability varies by plan and platform.

### Device Security

- **Antivirus & Anti-Malware:** Real-time detection and blocking of viruses, malware, ransomware, spyware, and trojans.
- **100% Virus Protection Promise:** Norton's commitment to keep eligible devices virus-free, or a refund on the current subscription term. Requires an automatically renewing subscription with antivirus features.
- **Norton Smart Firewall:** Monitors inbound and outbound network traffic for suspicious activity.
- **SafeCam:** Webcam protection on Windows PCs that blocks unauthorized access attempts.
- **Wi-Fi Security:** Helps protect connections on home and public Wi-Fi networks.
- **Cloud Backup:** Secure cloud storage for important files and ransomware recovery support (Windows only). 2 GB on Standard, 50 GB on Deluxe, 250 GB on Select Plus.

### Online Privacy

- **Norton VPN:** Encrypted VPN with no-log policy, Kill Switch, Split Tunneling, and 2,800+ servers across 28 countries.
- **Compromised Network Detection:** Alerts users when connecting to a network with security concerns.
- **AntiTrack:** Blocks browser fingerprinting and online trackers.
- **Privacy Monitor:** Identifies where personal information appears online and helps reduce public exposure.
- **Privacy Monitor Assistant:** Automated data broker removal that scans and submits opt-outs on the user's behalf.
- **Private Browser:** Isolated browser session for sensitive activity such as banking (Windows and Mac).

### Scam Protection

Norton 360 plans include **Scam Protection** as a foundational feature; Norton 360 with LifeLock plans upgrade to **Scam Protection Pro**, which adds Safe Email and Safe Call.

- **Genie AI-Powered Scam Detector:** AI assistant that provides real-time guidance on suspicious offers, messages, and websites.
- **Safe Web:** Detects and blocks malicious or fake websites before users visit them.
- **Safe SMS:** AI-powered scam detection in text messages.
- **Safe Email** *(Scam Protection Pro)*: AI scanning of email inbox to flag phishing and scam messages.
- **Safe Call** *(Scam Protection Pro)*: Identifies and labels scam and spam phone calls.
- **Scam Dashboard:** Central view of detected scam threats.
- **Deepfake Protection:** Helps identify AI-generated video content used in fraud. Automatic detection requires Windows 11 and supported hardware; manual scan available on more devices.

### Account & Credential Safety

- **Norton Password Manager:** Stores, generates, and autofills passwords and login credentials across devices.
- **Dark Web Monitoring:** Scans dark web forums, marketplaces, and breach data for exposed personal information.
- **Parental Control:** Online safety and activity monitoring features for families and children (Windows PC, iOS, Android).

### Across Plans

- **24/7 Live Member Support:** Customer support available around the clock for Norton subscribers.
- **60-Day Money-Back Guarantee:** Refund window for annual subscriptions.
- **Multi-Device Coverage:** Protection across Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android.

## Learn / Blog

Norton's blog is organized into four major content areas — Security, Privacy, Performance, and Featured Topics — plus a dedicated Research section.

### Blog home and editorial standards

- [Norton Blog](https://us.norton.com/blog): Articles on cybersecurity, scams, malware, privacy, identity theft, online safety, and digital wellness.
- **Editorial standards:** Each Norton blog article carries an editor's note: "Our articles offer educational information and are written to raise awareness about important topics in Cyber Safety. Norton products and services may not protect against every type of threat, fraud, or crime we write about. For more details about how we research, write, and review our articles, see our Editorial Policy." The Editorial Policy is linked from individual blog articles.
- [Norton Research](https://us.norton.com/blog/research): Threat research, cybersecurity reports, and emerging digital threat analysis.

### Scams

- [Scams hub](https://us.norton.com/blog/online-scams): Scam awareness, phishing, impersonation, and fraud prevention.
- [Tech support scams](https://us.norton.com/blog/online-scams/how-to-recognize-and-avoid-tech-support-scams): How to spot and avoid tech support scams.
- [Vishing](https://us.norton.com/blog/online-scams/vishing): Voice phishing scams.
- [Tax scams](https://us.norton.com/blog/online-scams/tax-scams): IRS scam awareness.
- [Nigerian prince scam](https://us.norton.com/blog/online-scams/nigerian-prince-scam): Classic advance-fee fraud.
- [Reservation hijacking scam](https://us.norton.com/blog/online-scams/reservation-hijacking-scam): Travel scam.
- [Norton Genie](https://us.norton.com/blog/online-scams/norton-genie): Norton's AI scam detection assistant.

### Security

- [Security hub](https://us.norton.com/blog/security): General cybersecurity articles.
- [Account Safety](https://us.norton.com/blog/account-safety): Account security and login protection.
- [Artificial Intelligence](https://us.norton.com/blog/ai): AI-powered scams and AI safety.
- [Family Safety](https://us.norton.com/blog/family-safety): Online safety resources for parents and children.
- [Hacking](https://us.norton.com/blog/hacking): Hacker tactics and digital threat awareness.
- [Malware](https://us.norton.com/blog/malware): Malware, ransomware, spyware, and virus protection.
- [Phishing](https://us.norton.com/blog/phishing): Phishing attack education.
- [Security Tips](https://us.norton.com/blog/security-tips): General cybersecurity recommendations.

### Privacy

- [Privacy hub](https://us.norton.com/blog/online-privacy): Privacy-focused cybersecurity and data protection.
- [Digital Life](https://us.norton.com/blog/digital-life): Consumer technology and digital lifestyle.
- [Identity Protection](https://us.norton.com/blog/id-theft): Identity theft prevention, monitoring, and recovery.
- [Wi-Fi & Networking](https://us.norton.com/blog/wifi): Wi-Fi security and router protection.
- [VPN](https://us.norton.com/blog/vpn): VPN education and encrypted browsing guidance.
- [Privacy Tips](https://us.norton.com/blog/privacy-tips): Privacy protection and data exposure reduction.

### Performance

- [Performance hub](https://us.norton.com/blog/performance): Device speed and system health.
- [Cleaning](https://us.norton.com/blog/cleaning): Device cleanup and maintenance.
- [Gaming](https://us.norton.com/blog/gaming): Gaming safety and performance.
- [Hardware](https://us.norton.com/blog/hardware): Device hardware and connected-device security.
- [Software](https://us.norton.com/blog/software): Software safety and applications guidance.
- [Performance Tips](https://us.norton.com/blog/performance-tips): PC performance optimization.

### Featured Topics

- [Data Breach Knowledge Center](https://us.norton.com/blog/collections/data-breaches): Data breach reporting and response.
- [Shopping Scams](https://us.norton.com/blog/collecti
